ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the patient */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the patient */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the patient */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the patient */,
  "medical_record_number" TEXT /* Medical record number of the patient */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the patient was enrolled in the study */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the patient */,
  "smoking_status" TEXT /* Smoking status of the patient */,
  "alcohol_consumption" TEXT /* Alcohol consumption habits of the patient */,
  "medical_history" TEXT /* Additional medical history of the patient */,
  "emergency_contact" TEXT /* Emergency contact information of the patient */,
  "insurance_provider" TEXT /* Insurance provider information of the patient */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "biomarker_measurements" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each measurement */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient for whom the measurement was taken */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date the measurement was taken */,
  "nda_i" REAL /* Neural Damage Assessment Index (NDAI) */,
  "sd" REAL /* Standard Deviation (SD) */,
  "corr" REAL /* Correlation (CORR) */,
  "df" REAL /* Density Factor (DF) */,
  "cf" REAL /* Concentration Factor (CF) */,
  "bf" REAL /* Biological Factor (BF) */,
  "af" REAL /* Activity Factor (AF) */,
  "an" REAL /* Anomaly Score (AN) */,
  "measurement_location" TEXT /* Location where the measurement was taken */,
  "measurement_method" TEXT /* Method used for the measurement */,
  "measurement_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the measurement */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who took the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_biomarker_measurements_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the researcher */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., lead researcher, data analyst, statistician) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the researcher belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the researcher */,
  "office_location" TEXT /* Location of the researcher's office */,
  "expertise" TEXT /* Detailed description of the researcher's expertise and areas of focus */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Last date the researcher accessed the system */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Researcher's access level (e.g., read-only, full access) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient whose record was accessed */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who accessed the record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analysis_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis result */,
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the measurement the result is based on */,
  "analysis_date" TEXT /* Date the analysis was performed */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis (e.g., trend analysis, correlation analysis) */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Result value of the analysis */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who performed the analysis */,
  "analysis_method" TEXT /* Method used for the analysis */,
  "analysis_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the analysis */,
  "confidence_interval" TEXT /* Confidence interval of the analysis result */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the analysis result */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analysis_results_measurement_id FOREIGN KEY ("measurement_id") REFERENCES biomarker_measurements ("measurement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clinical_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each outcome */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient whose outcome is recorded */,
  "outcome_date" TEXT /* Date the outcome was recorded */,
  "outcome_type" TEXT /* Type of outcome (e.g., recovery, relapse, improvement) */,
  "outcome_description" TEXT /* Description of the outcome */,
  "outcome_value" REAL /* Value or score associated with the outcome */,
  "outcome_source" TEXT /* Source of the outcome data (e.g., clinical trial, patient report) */,
  "outcome_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the outcome */,
  "outcome_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the outcome (e.g., mild, moderate, severe) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clinical_outcomes_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_medical_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each medical history record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient whose history is recorded */,
  "diagnosis_date" TEXT /* Date the diagnosis was made */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Diagnosis given to the patient */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment provided to the patient */,
  "treatment_date" TEXT /* Date the treatment was administered */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "diagnosis_source" TEXT /* Source of the diagnosis (e.g., specialist, general practitioner) */,
  "treatment_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the treatment */,
  "treatment_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the treatment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_medical_history_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_visits" (
  "visit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient visit */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who visited */,
  "visit_date" TEXT /* Date of the visit */,
  "visit_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the visit */,
  "diagnosis" TEXT /* Diagnosis made during the visit */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment provided during the visit */,
  "follow_up_date" TEXT /* Date of the next follow-up visit */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "visit_location" TEXT /* Location of the visit (e.g., clinic, hospital) */,
  "visit_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the visit */,
  "visit_provider" TEXT /* Name of the healthcare provider who conducted the visit */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_visits_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_consents" (
  "consent_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each consent record */,
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* ID of the patient who gave consent */,
  "consent_date" TEXT /* Date the consent was given */,
  "consent_type" TEXT /* Type of consent (e.g., data sharing, publication) */,
  "consent_status" TEXT /* Status of the consent (e.g., active, withdrawn) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments */,
  "consent_document" TEXT /* Name or ID of the consent document */,
  "consent_signature_date" TEXT /* Date the consent was signed */,
  "consent_expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the consent */,
  "consent_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the consent */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("consent_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_consents_patient_id FOREIGN KEY ("patient_id") REFERENCES patients ("patient_id")
)
